# Linear polymer chain  n0=16  energy=1000.0
# Snake path through 4x4 grid: 0-1-2-3-7-6-5-4-8-9-10-11-15-14-13-12

0 1 1000.0
1 2 1000.0

7 6 1000.0
6 5 1000.0
5 4 1000.0
